group.name: YARG Alt 1
group.description: YARG Alternative 1 cues as node cue definitions

cues.name: Intro
cues.description: Solid low green color on front and back lights

cues.name: Silhouettes
cues.description: Solid green on back lights, or front if no back lights

cues.name: Score
cues.description: Solid medium blue on front with yellow flash

cues.name: Silhouettes Spotlight
cues.description: Flash blue on back (or front) on drum-red

cues.name: Stomp
cues.description: White flash on front lights triggered by keyframe

cues.name: Default
cues.description: Alternates red and blue between front and back on keyframe

cues.name: Cool Manual
cues.description: Alternates blue and green on even/odd on beat

cues.name: Cool Automatic
cues.description: Alternates blue and green between front and back on measure

cues.name: Warm Manual
cues.description: Alternates red and yellow between front and back on measure

cues.name: Chorus
cues.description: Random amber/purple or yellow/red per light, BPM-based timing

cues.name: Verse
cues.description: Random blue or yellow per light, BPM-based timing

cues.name: Big Rock Ending
cues.description: Chaotic random color flash per light

notes.label: Notes
notes.note:
Randomly flashes a colour on each light. 
Randomizes the duration and delay between flashes.
notes.title: Big Rock Ending

notes.label: Info
notes.note:
Effects are references to external Effect files. 
This lets us create reusable effects that can be used 
across different cues.
notes.title: Effects are External Files

cues.name: Frenzy
cues.description: Color cycling on beat, random red/green/blue/orange

cues.name: Menu
cues.description: Slow blue sweep around all lights with delay between passes

cues.name: Sweep
cues.description: Rapid sweep on front, color and direction by venue and random

cues.name: Searchlights
cues.description: Slow sweep of random bright color, alternating direction

cues.name: Flare Fast
cues.description: Quick blue bursts on front lights, random timing

cues.name: Flare Slow
cues.description: Slow white bursts on front lights

cues.name: Strobe Slow
cues.description: Slow white strobe, timing BPM/8 (approx 120 BPM)

cues.name: Strobe Medium
cues.description: Medium white strobe, timing BPM/16 (approx 120 BPM)

cues.name: Strobe Fast
cues.description: Fast white strobe, timing BPM/32 (approx 120 BPM)

cues.name: Strobe Fastest
cues.description: Fastest white strobe, timing BPM/64 (approx 120 BPM)

cues.name: Dischord
cues.description: Yellow CW on beat, green dual-mode on measure, blue alternating keyframe/beat, red flash on drum-red

cues.name: Harmony
cues.description: Cross-fade colours on measure; start/end from random (simplified vs note-based)
